naane naane

unnodu thaan en jeevan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Thenmadurai Vaigai Nadhi reflects themes of love and longing, evoking a sense of nostalgia for the beauty of Tamil culture.

What is the plot context of the movie Dharmathin Thalaivan?

The movie revolves around themes of justice and sacrifice, showcasing the protagonist's journey through various challenges.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the iconic voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and P. Susheela, with music composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

Thenmadurai Vaigai Nadhi was released on September 24, 1988.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thenmadurai Vaigai Nadhi, the lyrics beautifully encapsulate the essence of Tamil pride and love for one's roots. The song serves as a poignant reminder of the emotional connections we share with our homeland. Its soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, evokes feelings of nostalgia and warmth, making it a cherished classic. This track resonates deeply with listeners, transporting them to a simpler, more heartfelt time.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting vibes of Thenmadurai Vaigai Nadhi, a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of Tamil culture. This song, featured in the film Dharmathin Thalaivan, showcases the mesmerizing collaboration of legendary artists like Malaysia Vasudevan and P. Susheela under the masterful direction of Ilaiyaraaja. Let the soothing melodies transport you to a world of nostalgia and emotion.

There is no one like us, brother. Like water, you and I are one mother’s children.
Brother, your heart is like mine. Living together, we see the sky as one. There is no justice in changing the two.
With your eyes, you show your beauty. With your heart, you bring me forward. Your goodness will fulfill my wishes.
May this love and affection live on.
In my heart, you always stay, like a beautiful color.
There is a time when everything is seen in the eyes, like a garland on the bed.
There is a thief who has taken the heart of the beloved. Here I am, I am.
With you, my life is complete. Our God is the one who guides us, my star will never change.
May this love and affection live on.
